column1: # Add more models below. model_args can be: -hf owner/repo:quant OR -m /path/to/model.gguf
# If server_args is empty, the picker uses DEFAULT_SERVER_ARGS from ai-model-picker.sh.
# Gemma is pinned to the local non-MTP GGUF because -hf unsloth/gemma-4-12b-it-GGUF:BF16 currently resolves to MTP/gemma-4-12B-it-MTP-BF16.gguf.
